Table	Create Table
wheel_of_names_spins	CREATE TABLE `wheel_of_names_spins` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `spinDate` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `winnerId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `winnerName` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `wheel_of_names_spins_spinDate_unique` (`spinDate`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=60001
